title: Dogfood Pass 0003 Structured Market and Megatool Artifacts

claims.text: Pass 0003 produced Index-backed substrate receipts for build-universe, build-color, calibrate-pro, and telos, and project-scanner reported C:\dev\public is not a single monorepo.
claims.falsification: recorded tool outputs do not include the four Index maps or project-scanner is_monorepo=false

claims.text: Pass 0003 verified that Calibrate Pro enterprise receipt models are specified in project-docs but were not implemented as a calibrate_pro/enterprise package in this pass.
claims.falsification: recorded search output shows implemented calibrate_pro/enterprise files or enterprise receipt tests rather than only the spec/docs

claims.text: The pass 0003 MarketRow artifact contains 42 rows, every row has at least one source, and the three categories each contain at least 12 rows.
claims.falsification: JSON row count is not 42, any row lacks sources, or any category has fewer than 12 rows

claims.text: The pass 0003 WedgeScore artifact contains 8 scores and ranks AgentActionProofPacket first.
claims.falsification: JSON score count is not 8 or the first score is not AgentActionProofPacket

claims.text: The pass 0003 MegatoolNode artifact contains 8 nodes.
Pass 0003 promotes zero natural-law discoveries; all outputs remain market research, schema artifacts, or implementation plans.
claims.falsification: any pass 0003 artifact labels a new natural law, theorem, medical conclusion, finance result, or safety result as promoted
